title: hedyotis acerosa var. bigelovii
intro: Hedyotis acerosa var. bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's buttonweed, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Hedyotis acerosa var. bigelovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves for its medicinal uses.
